signatures: prelude intrinsic BigInt: arbitrary-precision signed integer
responsibility: public exact integer dependency for Rational normalization and explicit large-integer APIs; opaque storage and foreign ABI
notes: BigInt is not an Int64 substitute and grants no implicit mixed-domain operator conversion.

signature_records.text: prelude intrinsic BigInt: arbitrary-precision signed integer

signatures: prelude intrinsic Rational: normalized opaque BigInt numerator and positive denominator
public def Rational!(numerator: BigInt, denominator: BigInt) -> Rational throws RationalError
public def Rational.dividedBy.(borrow rhs: Rational) -> Rational throws RationalError
responsibility: canonical exact rational value with eager normalization, strong Eq/Ord/Hash/Keyable, sealed +,-,* evidence and explicit checked division/conversion APIs
notes: Display 2/3 and sourceRepr <2/3> are distinct; no public layout or ABI is promised.

signature_records.text: prelude intrinsic Rational: normalized opaque BigInt numerator and positive denominator
public def Rational!(numerator: BigInt, denominator: BigInt) -> Rational throws RationalError
public def Rational.dividedBy.(borrow rhs: Rational) -> Rational throws RationalError

signatures: prelude intrinsic Complex<Rep in {Float32, Float64}> { real: Rep; imag: Rep; }
public def Complex!(real: Rep, imag: Rep) -> Complex<Rep>
public def Complex<Rep>.dividedBy.(borrow rhs: Complex<Rep>) -> Complex<Rep>
public def Complex<Float64>.powComplex.(borrow exponent: Complex<Float64>) -> Complex<Float64>
responsibility: immutable two-component IEEE value with partial equality, sealed same-Rep +,-,* evidence, intrinsic division, principal named transcendental operations and no strong Eq/Ord/Hash/Keyable
notes: Attached 4.0i and 4.0f32i create exact component values; Complex::i is type-side and no companion singleton or public foreign ABI is implied.

signature_records.text: prelude intrinsic Complex<Rep in {Float32, Float64}> { real: Rep; imag: Rep; }
public def Complex!(real: Rep, imag: Rep) -> Complex<Rep>
public def Complex<Rep>.dividedBy.(borrow rhs: Complex<Rep>) -> Complex<Rep>
public def Complex<Float64>.powComplex.(borrow exponent: Complex<Float64>) -> Complex<Float64>

signatures: public enum PowerError { indeterminate; domain; profileMismatch; }
responsibility: checked named analytic power outcome; ordinary infix zero-to-zero follows the computational one convention
notes: PowerError is not an infix dispatch channel and does not convert IEEE NaN or infinity values into exceptions.

signature_records.text: public enum PowerError { indeterminate; domain; profileMismatch; }
